info.name: Farm AI Assistant
info.description: Farm AI Assistant API. GET context (farm bar data). POST chat (user message + optional farm_context/images). Static JSON only.

request.description: Returns static farm context: soilType, waterEC, selectedCrop, growthStage, lastIrrigationStatus for the context bar.
Body: content (required), optional images, conversation_id, farm_context. Returns static message with sections (recommendation, list, warning). Input not processed.

response.name: Success
